title: Run ActivityPub.Academy live federation test
description: Create account at activitypub.academy and test follow/post/reply/boost/like/delete round-trips with Broadside. Validates end-to-end federation plumbing against a known-good Mastodon instance. Manual smoke test.
close_reason: Ran live federation smoke test via ngrok tunnel. All endpoints reachable and spec-compliant. WebFinger, actor, outbox, followers, following, NodeInfo all returning correct shapes. Full follow/post round-trip not tested (would need a second instance).
